title: malus zhaojiaoensis
intro: Malus zhaojiaoensis, also known as the Zhaojiao apple, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malus zhaojiaoensis include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. It is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
